info.name: RAG Chat Storage
info.description:
Complete end-to-end and corner-case test suite for the RAG Chat Storage Service.

**Setup:** Set the collection variables `baseUrl`, `apiKey`, and `userId` before running.

**Execution order:** Run the folders in sequence — the pre-request scripts and tests carry `sessionId` / `messageId` forward via collection variables so the full flow is chainable as a Collection Runner.

item.name: 00 · Health
item.description: Verify the service is up before running anything else.

item.name: 01 · Sessions – Create
item.description: POST /api/v1/sessions — all happy-path and validation edge cases.

exec: pm.test('title matches', () => pm.expect(b.title).to.eql('My First RAG Session'));

item.name: POST session – 201 title omitted → defaults to Untitled Chat
POST session – 201 title is null → defaults to Untitled Chat
POST session – 201 title whitespace → defaults to Untitled Chat
POST session – 201 title with leading/trailing spaces → trimmed
POST session – 401 no API key header
02 · Sessions – List
item.description: GET /api/v1/sessions — pagination, filtering, and edge cases.

item.name: GET sessions – 200 all sessions for user
GET sessions – 200 page=999 returns empty content (beyond last page)
GET sessions – 200 unknown user returns empty list
03 · Sessions – Update
item.description: PATCH /api/v1/sessions/{sessionId} — rename, favorite flag, ownership, and edge cases.

item.name: PATCH session – 200 rename + favorite in one call
PATCH session – 200 title with surrounding spaces → trimmed
04 · Messages – Create
item.description: POST /api/v1/sessions/{sessionId}/messages — sender types, content validation, context field, ownership.

item.name: POST message – 201 USER sender no context
POST message – 201 ASSISTANT sender with retrievedContext
POST message – 201 content with leading/trailing spaces → trimmed
POST message – 201 retrievedContext whitespace-only → stored as null
POST message – 400 sender invalid enum value
POST message – 404 session not owned by userId
GET messages – 200 page beyond last → empty list

exec: // Create a throw-away session to delete
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ userId, title: 'Temp Delete Me' }) }

item.name: DELETE session – 404 wrong owner cannot delete
DELETE session – 400 invalid UUID in path
DELETE session – verify messages also deleted (cascade)

exec: // After the session was deleted in the happy-path test,
// GETting its messages must return 404, not 200 with empty list.

item.name: 07 · Security
item.description: Authentication edge cases — header casing, empty value, whitespace, SQL/header injection attempts.

item.name: GET sessions – 401 X-API-Key header empty string
POST session – userId SQL injection attempt

exec: // Should either create a session with the literal string or return 400.
// Must NOT return 500 (no SQL injection leakage).
pm.test('userId stored as literal', () => pm.expect(b.userId).to.eql("'; DROP TABLE chat_sessions; --"));

item.name: POST message – XSS in content stored verbatim
08 · Rate Limit
item.description: Verify X-Rate-Limit-* headers are present and that 429 is returned once the bucket is exhausted. Uses a dedicated API key so it doesn't interfere with other tests.

item.name: Single request – rate limit headers present

exec: // Make a baseline call and capture remaining

item.name: 09 · Static UI & Swagger
item.description: Confirm the UI and API docs are reachable without an API key.

item.name: 10 · End-to-End Flow
item.description: Full lifecycle: create session → add USER message → add ASSISTANT reply with context → list messages → rename → favorite → verify list filter → delete → confirm gone.

item.name: E2E 3 – Add ASSISTANT reply with RAG context
E2E 4 – List messages, verify order and count
E2E 5 – Rename session, verify updatedAt advances
E2E 7 – List with favorite=true contains our session

exec: const found = b.content.some(s => s.id === e2eId && s.favorite === true);
pm.test('e2e session appears in favorites list', () => pm.expect(found).to.be.true);

item.name: E2E 9 – Session no longer in list

exec: pm.test('deleted session not in list', () => pm.expect(found).to.be.false);

item.name: E2E 10 – Messages return 404 after session deletion (cascade verified)
